backend/file-storage/file-storage.mo: Motoko module implementing file storage with chunked blob uploads, asset listing, deletion, and HTTP request handling including streaming callbacks for multi-chunk assets.
backend/file-storage/http.mo: Motoko module defining HTTP type definitions for requests, responses, streaming tokens, and streaming callback types used by the file storage system.
backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining all data types (waivers, gallery, contacts, etc.) and stable storage maps for a kids' play center app with admin access control, file storage, and bilingual support.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features in PrivateEvents.tsx: removal of dedicated-staff language and addition of a $100 weekday discount display.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, covering hooks, components, contexts, and utilities for the kids' conservatory app.
frontend/.ic-assets.json: ICP asset configuration file that enables serving the .well-known directory and sets CORS and caching headers for the Internet Identity alternative origins JSON file.
frontend/DEPLOYMENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md: Documentation explaining how to configure Internet Identity alternative origins and derivation origins to resolve unverified-origin errors, especially on mobile devices.
frontend/DEPLOYMENT_STATUS.md: Comprehensive status document listing all implemented backend endpoints and frontend features for the Kids Conservatory app, including waiver, gallery, admin, and authentication systems.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry point for the KIDS Indoor Play & Event website with comprehensive SEO meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Card, and structured data for the Oklahoma City indoor playground business.
frontend/public/.ic-assets.json5: ICP asset configuration file that enables serving of the .well-known directory by setting ignore to false.
frontend/public/.well-known/ic-domains: ICP domain verification file listing the custom domains kids405.com and www.kids405.com for the Internet Computer canister.
frontend/public/.well-known/ii-alternati: Internet Identity configuration listing alternative origins for the ICP canister to support authentication across multiple domains.
frontend/public/env.json: Environment configuration file specifying the backend canister ID and Internet Identity derivation origin for the ICP deployment.
frontend/public/robots.txt: SEO robots.txt file allowing major search engine crawlers, blocking sensitive paths like /admin and /waiver-check, and pointing to the sitemap.
frontend/public/site.webmanifest: PWA web manifest defining app metadata, icons, theme colors, and shortcuts for booking parties, signing waivers, and viewing the gallery.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing all major page sections of kids405.com with priorities, change frequencies, and image metadata for SEO indexing.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up routing (TanStack Router), React Query, Internet Identity, and language providers, defining routes for the main page, waiver, admin, and employee check-in pages.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying facility highlights including safety, cleanliness, age-appropriateness, and supervised play feature cards, plus important visit requirements.
frontend/src/components/Admin.tsx: Empty admin component file with no implementation.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogTab.ts: Admin panel tab for creating, editing, and deleting blog articles, including fields for title, content, category, tags, featured image upload, and SEO metadata.
frontend/src/components/BirthdayPackages: Birthday packages section component displaying Basic and (implied) premium party package cards with weekday/weekend pricing, included features, and a contact scroll button.
frontend/src/components/Blog.tsx: Empty blog component file with no implementation.
frontend/src/components/CommunityBoard.t: Empty community board component file with no implementation.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section component displaying address, phone, email, and business hours in a four-column card grid layout.
frontend/src/components/DailyAdmission.t: Displays a section with weekday ($10) and weekend ($12) admission pricing cards for a children's indoor play facility, including a scroll-to-contact button.
frontend/src/components/FAQ.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWaiverBu: Renders a fixed floating button in the bottom-right corner that navigates users to the waiver signing page.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, social media links, quick navigation links to page sections, and hidden admin/employee portal navigation buttons.
frontend/src/components/Gallery.tsx: Fetches and displays a masonry-style photo gallery of play area images with lazy loading, error fallback, and lightbox support on click.
Full-screen lightbox overlay for gallery images supporting keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Escape), previous/next buttons, and an image counter.
frontend/src/components/GroupDiscounts.t: Displays a group discount pricing section ($9/child for 10+ children) targeting schools, daycares, and youth organizations with a benefits breakdown.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with scroll-aware active section tracking, smooth scrolling to page sections, mobile menu toggle, and a language switcher using LanguageContext.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a gradient background, branding, translated headline/subtitle, and CTA buttons to sign a waiver or scroll to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Media.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyPasses.ts: Displays a $50/child unlimited monthly pass section with a benefits grid and a button that scrolls to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/Newsletter.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Packages.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/PlayAreas.tsx: Renders a grid of six themed play area cards (Toddler Zone, Climbing, Active Play, etc.) with icons and a safety-focused banner at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/Pricing.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/PrivateEvents.ts: Section for booking the entire facility privately, showing 2-hour and (implied) longer rental pricing cards with weekday discounts and a scroll-to-contact CTA.
frontend/src/components/Requirements.tsx: Displays facility entry requirements including a mandatory waiver policy and a grip socks policy, with a button linking to the contact/waiver section.
frontend/src/components/SafetyNotice.tsx: Renders a safety notice section informing visitors that grip socks are required, with pricing displayed for children's ($2) and adult ($2.50) grip socks available at the front desk.
frontend/src/components/SocialShare.tsx: A reusable social sharing component that provides buttons to share a URL on Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and WhatsApp, plus a copy-link button and optional Web Share API support.
frontend/src/components/WaiverCheck.tsx: An employee-facing waiver lookup tool that requires Internet Identity authentication, then allows searching and browsing recent waivers by child or parent name with expandable detail views.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Defines a React context for English/Spanish language switching, providing a comprehensive typed translations interface covering all major site sections (navigation, hero, admission, birthday packages, etc.).
frontend/src/file-storage/FileList.tsx: Provides utilities for listing files from the ICP backend canister, generating environment-aware file URLs (local dev vs. production IC), and invalidating the React Query file list cache.
frontend/src/file-storage/FileUpload.tsx: Implements chunked file uploads (2 MB chunks) to the ICP backend canister via the actor, with upload progress reporting and automatic cache invalidation on completion.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, including user profiles, waiver submission/retrieval, website content, gallery images, file management, email subscribers, and check-in operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and adds utility styles for scrollbars, animations, mobile responsiveness, and accessibility.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPlaceholder.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for managing waivers, website content, gallery images, file uploads, and email subscribers, gated behind Internet Identity authentication and admin role checks.
frontend/src/pages/EmployeeCheckIn.tsx: Employee-facing check-in page that allows searching customers by name and recording waiver check-ins, displaying visit counts via toast notifications.
frontend/src/pages/EmployeeWaiverCheck.t: A React page that allows employees to search and view recent waivers by child or parent name, with auto-refreshing recent waivers list and expandable waiver detail rows.
frontend/src/pages/WaiverPage.tsx: A React page that displays a comprehensive liability waiver and photo release form for parents/guardians to fill out and submit for their children at KIDS Indoor Play.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom CSS variable-based color tokens, border radius values, and accordion keyframe animations with the tailwindcss-animate plugin.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for KIDS Indoor Play tracking existing features and pending requests, including private event pricing ($650/$800), a $100 weekday discount, and removal of dedicated staff language.
